title: boronia ternata var. glabrifolia
intro: Boronia ternata var. glabrifolia, also known as the smooth-leaved boronia, is a shrub native to Australia and a member of the citrus family Rutaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal remedies, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of boronia ternata var. glabrifolia include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Boronia ternata var. glabrifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
